description_long: This is a modern bungalow situated on a large, flat green plot, featuring a clean, geometric design with multiple interconnected rectangular volumes. The exterior is predominantly white and gray, with large windows and sliding glass doors that allow for ample natural light. The property includes a private swimming pool, visible from the side, and landscaped areas with small trees and shrubs. The roof is mostly flat, with some sections slightly elevated, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic. The building appears to have a single story, with a spacious open-plan layout and outdoor living spaces. The overall impression is one of luxury and simplicity, blending indoor and outdoor environments seamlessly.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with flat roofs, large windows, and a private pool, set on a spacious green plot. The design is geometric and contemporary, with landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: Distant top-down view showing the bungalow centered on a large green plot, highlighting the building's compact footprint.
description_view_1: Front-facing view displaying the main entrance, flat rooflines, and a glimpse of the landscaped entryway.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the building's depth, window arrangements, and the layered roof structure.
description_view_3: Rear view revealing the swimming pool, outdoor living area, and additional landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
